blended.narrative: Sun Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
